title: Real Estate Portfolio
description: Track and manage your property investments

toolsHub.pageDescription: Advanced simulators to help you make the best real estate investment decisions.
toolsHub.franceOnlyNotice: This tool uses French-specific tax regulations and is only available when your country is set to France (current: {{country}}). Change your country in Settings.

buyRent.title: Buy vs Rent Comparator
buyRent.description: Compare the costs and benefits of buying versus renting over multiple years. Analyze wealth evolution and determine the best option for your situation.

rental.title: Furnished Rental Simulator
rental.description: Analyze the profitability of your rental investment under 4 French tax regimes. Optimize your tax strategy and maximize your income.

toolsHub.step1Description: Start by evaluating whether buying or renting is more advantageous for you. Enter the desired property parameters, loan conditions, and associated costs. The simulator will calculate the evolution of your wealth over several years.
toolsHub.step2Description: If you are considering investing in furnished rental, use this simulator to compare the 4 available tax regimes. It will automatically calculate your cash-flow and net profitability under each regime.
toolsHub.tip: 💡 Tip: You can transfer data from the buy/rent comparator to the rental simulator for a complete analysis of your investment project.
toolsHub.disclaimer: These simulators are provided for informational purposes only. The results do not constitute financial or tax advice. Consult a professional for your specific situation.

conversionWarning.message: in a foreign currency could not be converted to {{baseCurrency}} and {{verb}} excluded from the totals above. Check your exchange rate settings or ensure rates are available for all property currencies.

loadError: Failed to load properties. Please try again later.

empty.noMatch: No properties match your filters. Try adjusting your search criteria.
empty.noProperties: Add your first property to start tracking your real estate portfolio.

validation.purchaseDateFuture: Purchase date cannot be in the future

comparator.title: Buy vs Rent Comparator
comparator.description: Compare the costs and benefits of buying real estate versus renting over several years.
